title: Optimised
description: This modpack boosts your FPS for smooth gameplay using a modern renderer and optimizations with vanilla-friendly enhancements.
body:
![FPS with Optimised](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d5bcd577547c21c78599e7eaee865fc89adb1e0.png)

Experience Minecraft like never before with this carefully curated collection of optimization and quality-of-life mods for the Fabric loader. Designed for maximum performance and a visually enhanced vanilla experience, this modpack overhauls the game's engine without altering core gameplay.

Enjoy a significant **FPS boost**, **smoother gameplay**, and **reduced stuttering**, thanks to a state-of-the-art rendering engine and numerous under-the-hood optimizations that minimize memory usage and CPU load. Full support for modern shaders is included right out of the box, allowing you to bring stunning visuals to your world with just a few clicks.

Beyond pure performance, this pack enhances your gameplay with subtle but powerful features:

- Advanced graphics options and full support for connected textures.
- A dedicated, highly customizable zoom key for getting a closer look.
- The ability to see much further on servers by locally saving and rendering chunks beyond the server's view distance.
- Full controller support and an improved in-game menu for configuring every mod to your liking.
- To acces the indev versions: [https://optimised.netlify.app/](https://optimised.netlify.app/)
